title: Wireon Lite
description: Optimize your Minecraft with Wireon Lite, made for Wireon
body:
_**Built on [OMGptimized](https://modrinth.com/modpack/omgptimized)!**_

# 📙 Main information
The Wireon Lite was created for Wireon. Unlike other modpacks on which this modpack is built, it contains mods recommended for use on this server. If you want the gameplay on this server to be stable and optimized, use this modpack.

# ❓ Features
1. [PlasmoVoice](https://modrinth.com/plugin/plasmo-voice)
2. [Emotecraft](https://modrinth.com/plugin/emotecraft)
3. [OMGptimized](https://modrinth.com/modpack/omgptimized) as base
4. Other cool mods (full list later)

# 🤔 Why this modpack?
Your choice is yours, and I don't want to force you to use my modpack, but I'll appreciate your support and downloads. This modpack has the best optimization pack, which gives the best results on every server/singleworld.

---
 
### About the server
Wireon is a vanilla Minecraft server with unique, handcrafted mechanics that seamlessly integrate with familiar gameplay. Here, you'll find a well-developed storyline and lore, with players able to either participate in or observe events from the sidelines. The server regularly hosts events, quests, and competitions, and considers player ideas for further development.
